☆ SOCIOCORELayer 1 Relational Flow Engine
EQUILIBRIUM: --

SocioCore

Deterministic relational governance engine. Social energy, identity coherence, relational stability, and communication load management — 42 nodes across 4 irreducible primitives. Relationships are systems. We route them like one.

4 PRIMITIVES
42 NODES
-- EQUILIBRIUM
Architecture
The relational system decomposes into four irreducible social flows
⚡
Energy
10 NODES
Social battery, interaction demand, engagement quality, and boundary integrity.
★
Identity
10 NODES
Self-concept clarity, values alignment, masking load, and narrative coherence.
❤
Relational
11 NODES
Trust level, attachment security, repair capacity, and relational satisfaction.
✉
Communication
11 NODES
Expressive clarity, emotional labor, misunderstanding rate, and assertiveness.
How It Works
SocioCore reads relationships like deterministic systems
01
4 Primitives
Every relational state reduces to four irreducible flows: Energy, Identity, Relational, and Communication. These are the four axes of the engine.
02
42 Nodes
Each flow decomposes into 10-11 measurable nodes (social battery, masking load, trust level, etc.) — 42 total. Each holds a value from 0 (critical) to 100 (optimal).
03
Continuous Sensing
SocioCore continuously reads all 42 nodes, computes relational pressures, and maintains an equilibrium score — a single number representing total social stability.
04
Deterministic Governance
When social battery depletes or conflict friction exceeds thresholds, the engine flags, escalates, and reroutes. No guessing. Pure deterministic relational flow control.
--
Equilibrium
Live Telemetry
Real-time node monitoring across the active primitive
SOCIOCORE.
© 2026 Invariant Foundation. Deterministic Relational Governance.
